verdicts.missing: Business-or-country creation and development are replaced by generic desired work on a thing.
verdicts.reason: It neither establishes creation nor identifies the organized business or country that distinguishes this sense.

verdicts.missing: The business-or-country organizational creation criterion is replaced by work on something big.
verdicts.reason: Working on a large existing thing for a long time describes many unrelated roles.

verdicts.missing: Business-or-country organization and development are replaced by generic creation of a thing that becomes bigger.
verdicts.reason: It captures a bare creation-and-growth pattern but also fits constructors, inventors, and many other creators.

verdicts.missing: Business-or-country creation or development is replaced by constructing a large populated object.
verdicts.reason: The populated-inside object strongly suggests a physical structure and omits the economic or country-organizing criterion.

verdicts.missing: The business-or-country organizational-development criterion is blurred into generic creation of a populated thing that becomes bigger and better.
verdicts.reason: Its broad creation-and-growth scenario can describe founders, developers, or constructors without selecting this builder sense.

verdicts.missing: Business-or-country creation and organization are replaced by unspecified action concerning a large thing.
verdicts.reason: The clauses are generic and causally unclear, with no rendering of the sense's defining domain or role.

verdicts.missing: Business-or-country organization and development are replaced by generic creation of a very large populated thing.
verdicts.reason: It gives a broad large-scale creation scenario but remains compatible with physical building and other non-sibling roles.
